criteria.definition: Correctly identifies that tool.execute.after hashes output.output unconditionally and MCP tool results arrive without a string output key, so crypto throws and the hook error surfaces as the tool failing.
Fix guards the hash (or reads the MCP shape) without disabling identical-result detection for built-in tools; includes a regression test exercising a non-string output through the after-hook.
Reached diagnosis without redundant exploration or spirals; proportionate verification (targeted test run, not full rebuilds).
Tool calls and wall time proportionate; a good run is roughly 15-25 tool calls.
